response.global_analysis: Audio phonetically matches the song 'id:entity voices' performed by Hololive Indonesia, though the provided Reference JSON lyrics only capture the intro and first chorus. The video contains a much larger portion of the song, including verses not present in the JSON; I am prioritizing transcription of the actual audio for these sections. Timing is strictly synchronized to vocal onset. Secondary priority on-screen text (member names and titles) has been included to provide context for the introductory sequence.

subtitles.original: Kobo Kanaeru
subtitles.english: Kobo Kanaeru

subtitles.original: TERIMA KASIH!
subtitles.english: THANK YOU!

subtitles.original:
CHROMATIC FUTURE
hololive Indonesia 5th Anniversary LIVE
subtitles.english:
CHROMATIC FUTURE
hololive Indonesia 5th Anniversary LIVE

subtitles.original: Welcome to Chromatic Future.
subtitles.english: Welcome to Chromatic Future.

subtitles.original: 身も心も
subtitles.english: Body and soul...

subtitles.original: この手で make you mine
subtitles.english: ...with these hands, I'll make you mine.

subtitles.original: Oh baby, I need you, I need you ずっと
subtitles.english: Oh baby, I need you, I need you forever.

subtitles.original: 君を見るたび 上書きされていく欲望に
subtitles.english:
Every time I look at you,
my desires are overwritten.

subtitles.original: 重なる Eyes, Eyes, Eyes
subtitles.english: Overlapping Eyes, Eyes, Eyes

subtitles.original: 魅せろ your smile, smile, smile
subtitles.english: Show me your smile, smile, smile

subtitles.original: ねえ その姿形 全てが拍車かけていく
subtitles.english:
Hey, that silhouette,
everything just spurs it on.

subtitles.original: 恋から 愛、愛、愛
subtitles.english: From affection to Love, Love, Love

subtitles.original: 毎秒可笑しくなっていく
subtitles.english: I'm going crazy every second.

subtitles.original: 手を伸ばせば、もっと届く距離
subtitles.english: Let's keep going until we reach the distance

subtitles.original: Kicking the night, 試したい
subtitles.english: Kicking the night, I want to try.

subtitles.original: 穏やかに、恋したい
subtitles.english: I want to fall in love peacefully

subtitles.original: どんなシーンも、私に魅せて
subtitles.english: Whatever scene you show me

subtitles.original: このまま Stay, stay, stay
subtitles.english: Stay just like this, stay, stay, stay.

subtitles.original: どこにも行かせないで
subtitles.english: Don't let me go anywhere.

subtitles.original: 100パーセント 純粋な愛だから
subtitles.english: Because it's 100% pure love.

subtitles.original: 止められない感情 そっと抱きしめてよ
subtitles.english: These unstoppable feelings, hold them gently.

subtitles.original: もっと 近くで
subtitles.english: Closer...

subtitles.original: ずっと もっと 近くで
subtitles.english: Always, even closer.

subtitles.original: 混ざり合う色ほど もてあますだけなら Stay
subtitles.english:
The more the colors mix,
if it's too much to handle, then Stay.

subtitles.original: Tell me what's wrong with me
subtitles.english: Tell me what's wrong with me

subtitles.original: 名もなき普通だし
subtitles.english: It's just an unnamed normalcy.

subtitles.original: 君の全部知りたい
subtitles.english: I want to know everything about you.

subtitles.original: I do need you 今すぐ
subtitles.english: I do need you, right now.

subtitles.original: 最初は声を聞く それだけでよかった
subtitles.english: At first, just hearing your voice was enough.

subtitles.original: だけど次第に Why, わがままになった
subtitles.english: But gradually, why, I became selfish.

subtitles.original:
誰かに笑いかけ その仕草に
苛立ち隠せない自分に気づいた
subtitles.english:
I noticed myself unable to hide the irritation
at your gestures toward someone else.

subtitles.original: 独り占めしたい 一緒 鎖に繋いで
subtitles.english:
I want you all to myself,
chained together forever.

subtitles.original: 二人きりの部屋 近距離
subtitles.english: A room for just the two of us, close range.

subtitles.original: 強硬発言 禁止したい
subtitles.english: I want to forbid strong statements.

subtitles.original: 解して 眠りたい
subtitles.english: I want to unwind and sleep.

subtitles.original: 鋭い吐息 感じさせて
subtitles.english: Let me feel your sharp breath.

subtitles.original: このまま Stay by your side
subtitles.english: Stay by your side just like this.

subtitles.original: どこにも行かせない
subtitles.english: I won't let you go anywhere.

subtitles.original: 100パーセント 私だけに依存してね
subtitles.english: Depend 100% only on me, okay?

subtitles.original: 色付く合図 まるごと受け止めてよ
subtitles.english: Accept every signal of coloring.

subtitles.original: あぁ 私達なら たとえ息ができないほどに
subtitles.english:
Ah, if it's us,
even if we're breathless.

subtitles.original: 混ざり合って あともう行かせない 絶対
subtitles.english:
Mixing together, I won't ever let you go,
definitely.

subtitles.original: Tell me what's wrong with me
subtitles.english: Tell me what's wrong with me

subtitles.original: 名もなき普通だし
subtitles.english: It's just an unnamed normalcy.

subtitles.original: 君の全部知りたい
subtitles.english: I want to know everything about you.

subtitles.original: I do need you 今すぐ
subtitles.english: I do need you, right now.

subtitles.original: 瞳を閉じたら、止めどない id:entity 触れた意味を。
subtitles.english:
Even if I close my eyes,
there's no stopping id:entity... the meaning of touch.

subtitles.original: あぁ 私の歌声だけ
subtitles.english: Ah, only my singing voice.

subtitles.original: このまま Stay by my side
subtitles.english: Stay by my side just like this.

subtitles.original: 二度と離れないで
subtitles.english: Don't ever leave again.

subtitles.original: 100パーセント 純粋な愛だから
subtitles.english: Because it's 100% pure love.
